name: Emperor Capital Group Limited
summary: Emperor Capital Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides a range of financial services in Hong Kong, the United States, and internationally. The company operates through Financing, Brokerage, Placing and Underwriting, and Corporate Finance segments. It offers commercial and personal loans comprising short-term unsecured loans, such as tax loans, bridging loans, term loans, and personal loans, as well as long-term secured loans, including property mortgage loans; and margin and initial public offering (IPO) financing. The company also provides brokerage services for securities, futures, and options traded on the exchanges in Hong Kong, Mainland China, and overseas countries; wealth management services, such as providing advice regarding an array of investment services, including securities, mutual funds, insurance-linked products, and real estate investment; asset management services; and discretionary investment services. In addition, it offers placing and underwriting services, as well as acts as a placing agents and underwriters for various Hong Kong listed companies; and corporate finance advisory services on takeovers code related transactions and undertakes sponsor work for IPOs, as well as provides advisory for corporate transactions, including placing, rights issue, corporate restructuring, and merger and acquisition services. Further, the company provides promotion and marketing, and insurance and other brokerage services. Emperor Capital Group Limited was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Wanchai, Hong Kong. Emperor Capital Group Limited is a subsidiary of Emperor Capital Group Holdings Limited.
